title: 🔥存量博弈加剧资金回流
body: 市场处于结构分化阶段。BTC.D 报 58.5%，7日逆势上涨 0.7%。价格较 200日成本偏离 -16.9%，资金却在撤离山寨币并涌入 BTC。该数值逼近 2026 年 6 月历史高位 59.19，避险效应显著。结构性偏多。山寨季何时开启？
title_en: 🔥 Intensifying Liquidity Rotation Drives Capital Inflow
body_en: The market is in a phase of structural divergence. BTC.D sits at 58.5%, bucking the trend with a 0.7% rise over the past 7 days. Despite price deviating -16.9% from the 200-day cost basis, capital is fleeing altcoins and flooding into BTC. This figure is approaching the historical high of 59.19 from June 2026, signaling a significant risk-off effect. Structurally bullish. When does altseason kick off?
